creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Wed May 29 00:44:15 2013
New Revision: 319336
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/319336

Log:
  It is an implementation of Sumbur consistent spreading algorithm.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/mailru/sumbur-ruby
  
  PR:		ports/178622
  Submitted by:	Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin@googlemail.com>

Added:
  head/devel/rubygem-sumbur/
  head/devel/rubygem-sumbur/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-sumbur/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-sumbur/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Wed May 29 00:42:21 2013	(r319335)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Wed May 29 00:44:15 2013	(r319336)
@@ -4183,6 +4183,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-stringex
     SUBDIR += rubygem-subexec
     SUBDIR += rubygem-sugar-high
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-sumbur
     SUBDIR += rubygem-sundawg_country_codes
     SUBDIR += rubygem-sysinfo
     SUBDIR += rubygem-systemu

Added: head/devel/rubygem-sumbur/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-sumbur/Makefile	Wed May 29 00:44:15 2013	(r319336)
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+# Created by: Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin@googlemail.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	sumbur
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.2
+CATEGORIES=	devel rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	g.veniamin@googlemail.com
+COMMENT=	Consistent spreading for server balancing
+
+RUBY_VER=	1.9
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-sumbur/distinfo	Wed May 29 00:44:15 2013	(r319336)

+++ head/devel/rubygem-sumbur/pkg-descr	Wed May 29 00:44:15 2013	(r319336)
